description_long: This is a rectangular, post-mounted traffic sign with a white background and black Cyrillic text reading 'ЗЛАТОУСТ'. The sign is bordered by a thin black outline and shows signs of weathering, with visible rust and dirt on both the sign face and the two supporting metal posts. The back of the sign is heavily rusted and dark, with mounting brackets and bolts visible, indicating robust construction for outdoor use. The posts are cylindrical and extend below the sign, designed to be embedded into the ground for stability. The overall appearance suggests the sign is used for marking the entrance to a location, likely a city or town named Zlatoust. The materials and wear indicate it is intended for long-term outdoor exposure in an urban or roadside environment.
description: A weathered, post-mounted rectangular traffic sign with black Cyrillic text 'ЗЛАТОУСТ' on a white background, supported by two rusted metal posts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white sign face with black Cyrillic text and visible weathering on the posts.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the sign and the cylindrical shape of the posts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a heavily rusted, dark metal surface with mounting brackets and bolts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and rusted posts.
